description: Self-correcting agent memory + MCP server: recall, supersede/revert/review corrections, erasure.
name: io.github.DanceNitra/mnemo

environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSON memory file the server persists to (defaults to ./mnemo_memory.json).
environmentVariables.name: MNEMO_PATH

environmentVariables.description: 1 (default) blocks a restated retired value from resurrecting a corrected fact; 0 = legacy keyed supersession.
environmentVariables.name: MNEMO_ECHO_GUARD

environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint for SEMANTIC recall (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1/embeddings for local Ollama). Unset = deterministic lexical recall.
environmentVariables.name: MNEMO_EMBED_URL

environmentVariables.description: Embedding model id used with MNEMO_EMBED_URL (default: text-embedding-3-small; for Ollama use e.g. nomic-embed-text).
environmentVariables.name: MNEMO_EMBED_MODEL
